name: io.github.mrosnerr/open-zk-kb
title: open-zk-kb
description: Persistent knowledge base for AI coding assistants. Stores decisions, preferences, patterns, and context as searchable Markdown notes with full-text and semantic search — so your assistant remembers across sessions.

tools.name: knowledge-search
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for relevant context using full-text and semantic search

tools.name: knowledge-store
tools.description: Store a note with one concept — decisions, preferences, procedures, observations, references, or resources

tools.name: knowledge-maintain
tools.description: Maintenance actions: stats, review stale notes, promote/archive/delete, rebuild index
